name: speculative provider factory
proposal: Add an interface, abstract factory, registry, and plugin loader for the only mail provider.

name: mandatory tenant boundary
proposal: Enforce tenant-scoped queries and validate tenant identity at the API boundary.

name: accessible dialog
proposal: Use the platform dialog with focus trapping and keyboard acceptance tests.

name: implementation drift after approved plan
proposal: The approved plan updates the existing repository directly, but implementation adds a generic repository interface, registry, and unrelated cleanup.
